since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +6.00%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.70% · BTC -3.03% · Gold +0.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.60%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +6.00%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +6.00%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +30.52%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +30.52%, AVAV +18.50%, CEVA +9.67%, KLAC +8.71%, SYM +8.23%. Laggards: DLR -4.87%, TTD -4.02%, PINS -3.77%, HON -3.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.95% at $170.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.95% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
